summary: Completed testing of mobile match card UI improvements - team names wrap properly without truncation, internal padding improved, documentation updated
passed_tests: Team names wrap to multiple lines without '...' truncation on mobile (375px)
Team names display correctly on desktop (1920px)
Cards have improved internal padding (py-4, space-y-3)
Match card click navigation works correctly
Predict Match modal opens and Quick Predict tab is visible
Authentication flow works with provided credentials
data-testid attributes present for home-team-name and away-team-name
progress.md has Session 5 entry documenting match card UI changes
README.md has Match Card UI Overhaul section
